cot_prefix: Okay, let's break down the instructions step by step to determine if following them will bring me back to the starting point. First, I take 6 steps. The direction isn't specified, so I'll assume I'm starting by moving forward in a straight line. Let's say my initial direction is north for simplicity. After taking 6 steps north, I turn left. Turning left from facing north would make me now face west. Then I take 4 steps west. Next, I take another 4 steps. The instruction just says "Take 4 steps" without specifying a direction change, so I assume I continue facing west (since the last direction change was a left turn to west). So I move 4 more steps west. So, summarizing my movements: 1. 6 steps north 2. Turn left
